name: Chocolate Tortoni
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt both kinds of chocolate in a microwave or over boiling water and set aside to cool.
2. Toast the almonds in a shallow pan at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 10 minutes.
3. Beat egg whites with cream of tartar and salt until foamy white.
4. Gradually beat in 1/4 cup sugar, one tablespoon at a time, until soft peaks form.
5. Beat two cups of whipping cream until stiff.
6. Add 2 tablespoons sugar, vanilla, and melted chocolate to the whipped cream mixture; blend well.
7. Fold in the beaten egg whites, chopped cherries, toasted almonds, and melted semi-sweet chocolate into the whipped cream mixture. Small chunks of chocolate may remain.
8. Freeze the mixture in paper baking cups lined in a 24-cup muffin pan (about 2 inches diameter) for four hours or overnight.
9. Beat remaining 1/2 cup whipping cream until stiff; garnish each tortoni with a rosette of cream and a candied cherry.
